closure_note: Batch: residual cleanup on branch v1.1-alignment-residuals (precheck hash, User TryFrom, build_validated, sync binding meta, CLI warnings, AGENTS docs)

entries.title: Precheck: validate canonical_hash format (sha256: + 64 hex) and non-empty for production bundles
Domain User: use typed enums or fallible wire conversion; remove unwrap/FromStr panic paths
Sync push: validate workspace_id/world_id/creator_id against daemon workspace binding where available

entries.title: npm @42ch/nexus-contracts version / SemVer policy vs TD-4 TS union narrowing

entries.title: BundleBuilder::build_validated: propagate SyncError instead of expect after validate()
Document enum_conversions.rs dual-maintenance rule; clarify sync pull scope in plan checklist
CLI sync push: surface misconfiguration when default workspace/world/creator IDs are used
entries.closure_evidence: nexus42 sync push: eprintln warning when placeholder IDs used

entries.title: Define cross-stack canonical_hash preimage (serde JSON bytes vs canonical JSON); align bundle.schema.json + golden vectors with nexus-platform

entries.title: Optional: invoke SyncClient::push_bundle from daemon after local stage when platform URL and auth token are configured
entries.closure_note: Opt-in via NEXUS_SYNC_EAGER_PUSH=1 plus NEXUS_SYNC_PLATFORM_URL and NEXUS_SYNC_PLATFORM_TOKEN; offline-first unchanged when disabled
